hypothesis: If a multi-stage AI-guided pipeline combining database mining, machine learning interatomic potential relaxation, and conditional generative modeling is applied to Li–Si–X chemical space, then it will identify and design silicon-based anode materials with theoretical capacities exceeding 1500 mAh/g and structurally stable large Li⁺ migration channels, because integrating geometric channel stability criteria with generative design constraints will preferentially select compositions that maintain ionic transport pathways upon lithiation and delithiation.
